# ocp_vserver (Data Source)

Represents OCP managed NetApp SVM



<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Optional

- `cluster_type` (String) Defaults to `PRIMARY`
- `customer_id` (String)
- `name` (String)
- `region` (String)
- `solution` (String) Defaults to `OCP`

### Read-Only

- `id` (String) The ID of this resource.
